title: thymus longicaulis var. ocheus
intro: Thymus longicaulis var. ocheus, also known as Oche's thyme, is a subspecies of thyme that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Oche's thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Oche's thyme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
